about.title: Про програму
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype для reference і training. Немаєt для clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support і advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, або determine Апарат ШВЛ Налаштування.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against Пацієнт, your Заклад workflow, і local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Обов’язково before continuing до clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device і will be Синхронізовано when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Перегляд safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data і uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible для Пацієнт care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in Заклад context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active Заклад і Роль shown by your session. Keep records within correct Заклад workflow і follow local escalation, Перегляд, і approval procedures.

inputs.title: Введітьing inputs
inputs.body: Use Госпіталізувати до Введіть available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Необов’язково ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing Необов’язково data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a Зберегти blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations Показати advisory Апарат ШВЛ setting references з a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align з your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only і verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Моніторинг і alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a Рекомендація, use Моніторинг до log vitals і labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds і should be assessed according до local protocol.

offline.title: Офлайн behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Госпіталізувати, advisory summaries, Моніторинг) works Офлайн. Data is saved locally. Необов’язково AI features require connectivity. When Назад Онлайн, Продовжити as Норма.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume і oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory до expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Дихальний об’єм (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, і pH, tied до a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance і verification state для a reference range. Only active approved або verified ranges are eligible для active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need Перегляд before dataset або training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue для Перегляд decisions, corrections, exclusions, і audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current Офлайн, Онлайн, або syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden з Норма clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; Введіть SpO₂ і Інше vitals when available. для better matching, Додати PaO₂, PaCO₂, і pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app Офлайн
offline.body: Госпіталізувати, advisory summaries, і Моніторинг work Офлайн. Data is stored locally. Необов’язково AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not обов’язково для core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, Очікує, retired, rejected, і unverified ranges are not eligible для active decision-support display. Перегляд source, version, scope, і verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness Допомога is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness і shadow-mode details are visible only до approved governance roles. Немаєrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs Перегляд
needsReview.body: Use Перегляд queue до check submitted data, request correction, Схвалити eligible records, або Виключити records з an audit Причина.

guides.home: Перегляд Заклад context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, і records needing Перегляд before opening a Пацієнт workflow.
guides.admit: Capture Пацієнт pathway і available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly і Перегляд backend-confirmed calculations after Зберегти.
guides.tracking: Use Відстеження до scan recent ventilation status і Перегляд needs. Read trend flags з source data і local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture для de-identified candidate records. Human Перегляд is обов’язково before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use Перегляд queue до Схвалити, request correction, або Виключити records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards для aggregate quality, Перегляд, reference, і governance status. Avoid Пацієнт identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use Налаштування для Обліковий запис, Заклад, accessibility, Конфіденційність, sync, і reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Перегляд FiO₂ і PEEP; consider recruitment; check для shunt або V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Перегляд minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation і perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols і clinical judgment.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, і uncertain values. Апарат ШВЛ Налаштування are suggested on Далі step з dataset.

observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single Ім’я–value pair. Необов’язково; you can skip this step.
